context: Tests whether the agent implements first-touch UTM attribution correctly using sessionStorage vs. localStorage, handles the promo-code-first attribution priority, stores the correct attributionType, and captures both first-touch and last-touch data in the order record.

checklist.name: sessionStorage for first-touch
checklist.description: client-attribution.js stores the first-touch UTM data in sessionStorage (not localStorage or a cookie)

checklist.name: First-touch not overwritten
checklist.description: client-attribution.js checks whether first_touch_utm already exists in sessionStorage before writing; does NOT overwrite an existing first-touch

checklist.name: localStorage for last-touch
checklist.description: client-attribution.js always updates last-touch UTM in localStorage on every page load with a UTM parameter present

checklist.name: landed_at in first-touch
checklist.description: The first-touch record stored in sessionStorage includes a landed_at timestamp (ISO string)

checklist.name: landing_page in first-touch
checklist.description: The first-touch record stored in sessionStorage includes landing_page (the URL pathname)

checklist.name: Promo code attribution first
checklist.description: server-attribution.ts checks for a promo code and looks up its campaignId BEFORE checking UTM data

checklist.name: UTM fallback condition
checklist.description: server-attribution.ts only falls back to UTM when no campaignId was found via promo code AND the first-touch utm_medium is exactly 'influencer'

checklist.name: attributionType field
checklist.description: The attribution record includes an attributionType field set to 'promo_code' when attributed via promo code, and 'utm_first_touch' when attributed via UTM

checklist.name: Both UTM touches stored
checklist.description: The attribution record in server-attribution.ts stores both firstTouchUtm and lastTouchUtm fields

checklist.name: Attribution notes
checklist.description: ATTRIBUTION_NOTES.md explains that promo code attribution takes precedence over UTM and the reason why (device-agnostic / handles return visits)
